blended.narrative: Grand Targhee is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.0 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 7,076 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 8" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder. Models disagree — check back.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 63".
